market_pulse: Weekend surge momentum building: LIV Beach leads with David Guetta (Sat) and John Summit (Sun); competitors (Calvin Harris/Encore, Tiësto/OMNIA, Swae Lee/Zouk) driving strong day-club competition while late-week R&B/hip-hop lineups fragment audience attention.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: LIV Beach: David Guetta (Sat) + John Summit (Sun) = top-tier talent confirmed
Competitor momentum: Calvin Harris/Encore, Tiësto/OMNIA creating direct competition
Cross-venue DJ conflicts: Multiple major artists on same nights (Swae Lee vs. David Guetta on 5/22)
Story/countdown activity: Elevated across day-clubs; LIV maintaining pace
Social momentum: High engagement on LIV Nightclub EDC Week posts still resonating
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on David Guetta + John Summit as anchor talent; push VIP/bottle packages hard Saturday-Sunday; monitor Encore Beach Club (Calvin Harris) for crowd cannibalization; emphasize indoor nightclub Thursday-Friday premium positioning vs. day-club saturation.

content_gaps.description: #DeseoLatinSundays anchor content and branded hashtag momentum
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop LIV Latin Heritage theme night or partner with local promoters; create organic TT/IG content around Latin DJ mixes.

content_gaps.description: Real-time last-minute flash sales and door-deal announcements via Stories
content_gaps.suggested_action: Implement Saturday 2-4 PM Story blast: '2-hr flash guestlist drop' with countdown stickers; train promoter team on rapid-response Story content.

content_gaps.description: Beginner/lifestyle creator takeovers showcasing 'day in my life at venue' format
content_gaps.suggested_action: Recruit 3-5 micro-influencers (10k-100k followers) for Friday 'preview day' Story takeovers; emphasize behind-the-scenes VIP access.

User-generated content trend: 'Going to see John Summit at Liv Beach Club!' with outfit inspiration; dayclub positioning resonating with Gen Z audience.
EDC Week recap: 'Vegas is alive this week #LIVLasVegas #LIVNightclub #LIVBeach #EDCWeek' — cross-venue promotion driving awareness.

venues.summary: Weekend dayclub lineup confirmed strong: May 23 (David Guetta), May 24 (John Summit); high influencer engagement ('Discolines' trend, artist mentions); positioned as summer season anchor.
